scope: Path A (Q1) — CLM ↔ EEG falsifier pre-register, dry-run on synthetic 16ch fixture. Real-EEG verification deferred to post-arrival D+1/D+3/D+5/D+7.

v1_to_v1_1_summary.what_changed: sha256 of P1 hexa + P1 emitted JSON + harness_smoke emitted JSON + fixture + synthetic_fixture hexa (silent regenerations between 2026-04-26 19:30:29 frozen_v1 and 2026-04-27 00:18 v1.1 freeze).  v1.0 archive sha block preserved verbatim from v1.json.
v1_to_v1_1_summary.policy_clause: Per v1.json post_hoc_change_policy: 'Any threshold modification requires v2 bump.  Silent edits are forbidden by raw#9 + chflags uchg lock.'  v1→v1.1 is metadata + sha re-freeze ONLY (no threshold change), hence v1.1 patch (not v2 bump).  Future threshold edit MUST bump v2.

P1_LZ.hypothesis: LZ76(EEG resting) and LZ76(CLM hidden) co-vary; |Δ|/human bounded

P2_TLR.hypothesis: EEG α-band coherence and CLM V_sync Kuramoto r co-rise (Tension-Link Resonance)

P3_GCG.hypothesis: EEG P3b parietal Granger-causes CLM layer 25-30; unidirectional (EEG→CLM ≥ 2× CLM→EEG)

composite.phenomenal_validated: ≥ 2/3 PASS triggers PHENOMENAL VALIDATED at D+7

post_hoc_change_policy: v1.1 IS the authorized sha-only patch.  Any further threshold modification requires v2 bump.  Silent edits are forbidden by raw#9 + chflags uchg lock + git tracking (recommended).  v1.1 (this entry) is metadata-only (sha re-freeze) and explicitly does NOT modify any C1/C2/verdict_rule threshold.  Negative falsifier: any future C1_lz76_eeg_min_x1000 != 650 OR C2_delta_human_max_permille != 200 OR baseline != 850 OR P2/P3/composite thresholds changed → v2 bump REQUIRED, v1.1 sha block insufficient.

sample_rate_canonical.note: SYNTHETIC_BOARD=250, CYTON 8ch=250, CYTON_DAISY 16ch=125, GANGLION 4ch=200. Helper queries fs dynamically — never hardcodes.

byte_identical_lock.lock_method: sha256 of helper sources + emitted JSON state files at frozen_at
byte_identical_lock.rerun_guarantee: Re-running any tool with same fixture seed produces byte-identical output (FNV-hash deterministic, no LLM, no clock).
byte_identical_lock.rerun_verified_v1_1: Twin-run sha256 stable confirmed 2026-04-27 (current measurement vs v1.json sha256 block: 10/10 match).
byte_identical_lock.git_tracking_recommendation: git add anima-clm-eeg/state/clm_eeg_pre_register_v1_1.json anima-clm-eeg/state/clm_eeg_pre_register_v1.json anima-clm-eeg/tool/clm_eeg_*.hexa anima-clm-eeg/fixtures/synthetic_16ch_v1.json + commit so silent-edit shows up as git diff (chflags uchg defends OS-side, git defends version-control-side; both recommended).

sha256_v1_1_frozen._note: Measured 2026-04-27 00:18 mac local via shasum -a 256.  These are the v1.1 frozen bytes.

sha256_v1_0_archive._note: Original frozen 2026-04-26 19:30:29 baseline. Forensic comparison: cf. v1.json sha256_v1_0_archive (preserved verbatim, this is a copy for v1.1 self-containment).

v1_0_to_v1_1_diff._note: Files whose sha changed between v1.0 archive and v1.1 frozen.

drifted_files.criteria_impact: none (C1=650/C2=200/baseline=850 verified preserved in current emitted JSON)
drifted_files.history_note: issue#48 detected intermediate sha cce9a801ef821524... at 2026-04-26 19:46.  Subsequent regeneration on 2026-04-27 00:16 produced the current 416e6be6.... v1.1 captures the latter.

v1_1_chained_fingerprint._note: sha256 of concatenated 10 hex sha (v1.1 frozen, fixed order: 5 hexa + 1 fixture + 4 emitted)
v1_1_chained_fingerprint._recompute_recipe: concat 10 lower-hex sha (in fixed order above) → sha256(ascii)

synthetic_caveat: Dry-run PASS does NOT imply real-EEG PASS.  P3 in particular uses lag-1 echo synthesis to encode the falsifiable EEG→CLM directional dependence — real recordings may falsify this without changing the frozen criteria above.  This is the intended falsification surface.

post_arrival_workflow.D+1: P1 LZ pre-register VERIFY against real .npy — USE v1.1 sha block as integrity baseline
